title: Remove admin privilege check blocking the Users section

requirements.text: Remove all remaining admin privilege / role-based access checks that block the Users section in the admin panel. Specifically, strip any guard in the backend that requires an admin role before returning user data (e.g. in any `getUsers`, `getAllUsers`, or similar query), and remove any frontend conditional in AdminPage or UsersTable that renders an 'Admin privileges required' error or hides the users tab based on a role check.

quotes: now it was asyin that Admin privileges required to view users.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the Users tab in the admin panel no longer shows an 'Admin privileges required' message.
The users table loads and displays all users without any access-denied error.
No backend function returns an access-denied or unauthorized error when fetching users.
No frontend code conditionally hides or blocks the Users section based on a role or admin flag.

constraints: Do not alter the user data schema or remove any user records.
Do not touch frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or anything under frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or tabs.
Implementing a new authentication or role system.
Changing the visual design of the admin panel.
